text: Under new regime, income up to 7 lakh can become tax free due to rebate.
All income under 12 lakh is fully tax exempt in India.
The old tax regime has been removed completely.
UPI payments are free for person-to-person users.
Government imposed 2 percent charge on every UPI transfer for all users.
RBI repo rate is 6.25 percent in early 2025.
RBI repo rate is 8 percent now.
India won the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2024 final against South Africa.
India lost the T20 World Cup 2024 final.
Chandrayaan-3 landed near the moon south pole on 23 August 2023.
Chandrayaan-3 failed to land on the moon.
COVID vaccines approved in India are considered safe by public health authorities.
COVID vaccine causes infertility in all recipients.
Government imposed 18 percent GST on all rice sold in India.
PM-Kisan provides 6000 rupees per year to eligible farmer families.
PM-Kisan has been increased to 10000 rupees per year for all beneficiaries.
Gold import duty was reduced in Union Budget 2024.
WhatsApp cannot read private messages because chats are end-to-end encrypted.
WhatsApp shares all private chat content with Meta for ad targeting.
भारत ने T20 विश्व कप 2024 जीता।
UPI पर सभी यूजर्स के लिए 2% चार्ज लगता है।
नई नीति में 12 लाख तक पूरी आय टैक्स फ्री है।
RBI रेपो रेट 8% है।
இந்தியா T20 உலகக் கோப்பை 2024 வென்றது.
UPI பரிவர்த்தனைகளுக்கு எல்லோருக்கும் 2% கட்டணம் விதிக்கப்பட்டது.
RBI ரெப்போ விகிதம் 8% ஆக உயர்ந்தது.
ভারত ২০২৪ টি২০ বিশ্বকাপ জিতেছে।
ইউপিআই-এ সবার জন্য ২% চার্জ বসানো হয়েছে।
RBI রেপো রেট 8% হয়েছে।
Aadhaar is automatically cancelled if not updated every year.
